description: Synthetic interior permanent-magnet (IPM) motor with strong d/q saliency (Lq/Ld=2.0). Used to validate saliency-sensitive observers (ActiveFlux, STSMO) and MTPA control strategies. Parameters are representative of a mid-power EV traction IPM with a 48V bus.
notes: Ld=0.10 mH, Lq=0.20 mH → Lq/Ld=2.0. Highest saliency among SPINOTOR profiles. Designed to stress-test ActiveFlux observer and STSMO under strong reluctance torque.
